name: Dyson Baudo Recreation Center
description: 1 wood and two mondo surface courts.
open_play_schedule: Call ahead. Schedule depends on college use. Varsity Teams and special events take precedent. Courts can be scheduled by members, students, faculty or staff by calling ahead or reserving in person.
fees: Members only — Community membership or one time fees are required.

name: Indian Acres Park
description: Indian Acres Park is a place to play pickleball in Marietta, OH. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: Lookout Park
description: 2 Tennis courts with pickleball courts on each side of the Tennis net. Must bring your own net.

name: Marietta College - Beren Tennis Courts
description: Marietta College - Beren Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marietta, OH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: The Betsey Mills Club
description: The Betsey Mills Club is a place to play pickleball in Marietta, OH. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
